themes.corpus_position: Basal cell carcinoma usually presents as a shiny pimple that doesn't heal after 6-8 weeks and may even bleed; while melanomas can be raised, most melanomas are flat.

quiz for reach, 15s ugly-duckling answer for follows
myth-bust: most melanomas are flat, not raised

videos.caption: The best tasting collagen🍓🥰 [Gelatin mixture] -Combine 1/4 cup beef gelatin& 1/2 cup room temp water [Maple syrup mixture] - Combine 1 cup maple syrup (honey is ok too), 1/2 cup water and 2 tsp vanill

themes.corpus_position: Exfoliate 1-2 times a week. Don't use a retinoid when pregnant — retinol/adapalene or azelaic acid at night can be used instead of tretinoin.

themes.name: Sunscreen-substitution myths & sun-protection habits
themes.receipt: 5 breakouts · 4 creators · 3.5M combined · 'habits over products' framing + diaper-cream-as-SPF debunks

videos.author: beautydermmd
videos.caption: Not her serum. Not her skincare. HER HABITS. 👀 Sun protection is elite behavior. UPF clothing. Wide-brim hat. Sunglasses. Shade. This is what dermatologists notice first. You should too. ☀️ #dermatolo

videos.author: drdrayzday
videos.caption: Diaper rash cream is not sunscreen. Always look for sunscreens that are labeled broad spectrum and with a stated SPF value (ideally 30 or higher). Don’t assume the presence of high concentrations of z

videos.author: drspf
videos.caption: Tinted sunscreen is NOT just makeup with SPF 👀 I especially love tinted sunscreens for melasma, hyperpigmentation, post-acne marks, and uneven tone because they contain iron oxides, which can help pro

her_coverage.summary: (IG) bemotrizinol sunscreen explainer 7.6d ago — 308K; library: tanning-through-sunscreen (TT) 2.8M, UV-index reminder (TT) 10.2M — her biggest video

themes.corpus_position: UVA is the longer wavelength responsible for tanning and signs of aging — tanning means UVA damage, even wearing sunscreen.
themes.winning_length: 6-8s habit flexes AND 75-160s debunk explainers — both winning

angles.angle: her habits, not her serum: UPF-and-shade flex video
debunk diaper-cream-as-sunscreen: barrier zinc isn't tested SPF

stitch_shortlist.author: @skincarewithyuri
stitch_shortlist.claim: daily olive-oil-lemon shots + collagen foods = filter skin

pitch.the_claim: Drink an olive-oil-and-lemon shot every day and eat collagen-rich foods and your skin looks like a filter.
pitch.why_it_stitches: SV tier, 5% breakout, ♥ gold (326K/day pace, flagged early) — a diet-fixes-skin claim her audience is already asking about
pitch.your_fit: covered: collagen-supplements explainer (TT Apr 2024) + her OWN glass-skin routine is superviral this week — collide her real routine with the wishful one; verdict on oral collagen needs her take on camera
angles: empathy-first: love the goal — here's what actually builds collagen
'you want me to WHAT?': drink olive oil daily?
switch-don't-quit: keep the diet, add the retinoid + SPF
pitch.length: original eats ~5-10s; 30-45s total (short listicles winning this wave)

stitch_shortlist.author: @skincarewithyuri
stitch_shortlist.claim: homemade beef-gelatin + maple gummies = 'best tasting collagen'

pitch.the_claim: DIY beef-gelatin gummy recipe as your daily collagen for skin.
pitch.why_it_stitches: fastest riser in the feed — 315K in 0.5d (24.6K/hr, 1% breakout, 631K/day pace); same creator driving the filter-routine wave
pitch.your_fit: her collagen-supplements explainer (Apr 2024) covers the science; the gelatin-vs-hydrolyzed-collagen distinction needs her take on camera
angles: 'you want me to WHAT?': gummy bears as skincare?
explain fibroblasts: eating collagen isn't applying collagen

pitch.why_it_stitches: 1.05M combined across IG+TT (TT version 3% breakout, ♥ silver, 421K in 4.6d); rubric miss recorded honestly: 4.9d — past the <4d rising bar
pitch.your_fit: no mist position in her corpus — needs her take (classic derm teaching point: water evaporation without an occlusive can dry skin out)
angles: half-right: mist feels great — here's what it can't do
